title: Solar-charge front + battery sense
prompt: I'm making a solar-charged Arduino (ATmega328) node. A ~6 V solar panel feeds a series blocking diode so it can't discharge the battery in the dark, then charges a battery/rail. The ATmega should also monitor the battery voltage through a divider on an ADC input, keeping the pin under its 5 V limit. For the bench check the panel is in sunlight at 6 V.

abstraction.reason: the solar panel is modelled as a fixed-voltage source at the tested illumination (a #105 voltage_source stand-in); the battery-sense divider and blocking diode are real
